productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Carlton Navy Blue  Running Sports Shoe
description: adidas Carlton, is a pair of shoes for Sports junkies. Styled with a sophisticated design, cut a dash with this pair at any sport event. Wear them with shorts and your favourite tee Upper Mesh upper with synthetic leather overlay adidas patented 3-Stripes on the sides of the midfoot Reinforced overlay for the heel cup and toe box for additional comfort Central lacing system Padded tongue and collar with branding for instep comfort Removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Midsole EVA Litestrike midsole for lightweight comfort Outsole TPR outsole with a decoupled heel for impact protection Circular lugs and curved terraced grooves for grip and traction shoe care Use a branded shoe polish to keep your footwear clean Do not store under sunlight
